events.name: interaction.created
events.description: An issue-thread interaction card was created (request_confirmation, ask_user_questions, suggest_tasks, or request_checkbox_confirmation).

events.name: interaction.confirmed
events.description: A request_confirmation or request_checkbox_confirmation interaction was accepted by the board/user.

events.name: interaction.rejected
events.description: An interaction was rejected by the board/user.

events.name: interaction.expired
events.description: An interaction expired due to a stale target revision or a superseding comment.
